title: Mango's Wood World
description: A mod provide a new method to get wood from the world.
body:
Choose which you prefer:
en (Translated with Google) This mod is used to provide a (or several) easy ways for players to obtain large amounts of logs more easily. **This mod was made for emergency use and uses MCreator. ** ## New Dimension A "Wood World" dimension that can be entered through a portal. Modeled after the Nether portal frame, use **Amethyst Blocks** to build the door frame, and then use **Amethyst Fragments** to synthesize **Activators** to light the portal. ![Screenshot at Wood World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/804930a87cd0503db23dd5829af5833003a4fdbf.png) Since the mod itself was made for emergency use, the new dimension completely uses the terrain algorithm of the End, with a main island at x=0, z=0, and an archipelago one thousand blocks away. There is currently only one biome that can generate low oak. The new dimension has day and night cycles and global illumination, and beds can be used. ## New Crafts (Still Under Design) Added a redstone machine "AutoTreer", which can make an auto-tree farm relatively easy. ![Simple Example to build a AutoTreer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e727b7585bd52d352ea455240841788a98fe6b9.png) The tree farm machine is already available and can be synthesized by placing it in the workbench as follows: any log | empty | any log
redstone | stone | redstone
any log | empty | any log ## Multiple Versions 1.20.1 Forge is the main version. Earlier versions are generated using MCreator with some settings, and stability or long-term support cannot be guaranteed.
zh_CN ~~太棒了，是中文玩家！（？）~~ 这个模组用于提供一种（或几种）简便的方式，供玩家更简单地获取大量的原木。 **本模组是为应急而紧急制作的，并且使用了MCreator。** ## 新的维度 一个「木世界」维度，可以通过传送门进入。仿照下界传送门框架，使用**紫水晶块**建立门框，然后使用**紫水晶碎片**合成**激活器**，点亮传送门。 ![Screenshot at Wood World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/804930a87cd0503db23dd5829af5833003a4fdbf.png) 由于模组本身是为应急而制作，新维度完全采用了末地的地形算法，在x=0、z=0处有一座主岛，一千格之外是群岛，目前只有一个生物群系，可以生成低矮橡木。新维度拥有昼夜交替和全局光照，可以使用床。 ## 新的工艺（尚在设计） 添加了一个红石类别的机器「自动树场机」，可以比较简单地制作挂机式树场。 ![Simple Example to build a AutoTreer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e727b7585bd52d352ea455240841788a98fe6b9.png) 树场机已经生存可用，在工作台中按如下摆放即可合成： 任意原木 | 空 | 任意原木
红石粉 | 石头 | 红石粉
任意原木 | 空 | 任意原木 ## 多版本 1.20.1 Forge是主要版本，更早的版本是使用 MCreator 通过一些设置生成的，不能保证稳定性或长期支持。
